<RingProgress Value="70" ShowLabel="true" Color="warning" />
<RingProgress Value="70" ShowLabel="true" Color="destructive" />

mdSummary:
# RingProgress

Circular determinate progress ring with optional centre label or custom content.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/ring-progress

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| RingProgress | Value | `double` | `` |  |
| RingProgress | Size | `int` | `64` |  |
| RingProgress | Thickness | `int` | `6` |  |
| RingProgress | Color | `string` | `"primary"` |  |
| RingProgress | TrackColor | `string` | `"muted"` |  |
| RingProgress | ShowLabel | `bool` | `` |  |
| RingProgress | LabelContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| RingProgress | RoundedCaps | `bool` | `true` |  |
| RingProgress | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| RingProgress | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `LabelContent` (RingProgress) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<RingProgress />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/RingProgress/RingProgress.razor`
